description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the haskell:latest Docker image. Define a before_script that sets LC_ALL=C.UTF-8, installs pkg-config and brotli via apt-get, sets STACK_ROOT to the .stack directory, runs stack setup, installs only dependencies, and builds the project. Add a build job that caches the _cache and .stack directories, runs on all branches except master, and executes stack exec site build. Add a pages job that also caches _cache and .stack, runs only on the master branch, runs stack exec site build then compresses all public assets (html, ico, atom, xml, js, svg, css) with brotli using a find command, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact.
